mapper.select: SELECT A1. ID "planId", A2. ID "trustId", A3.BUSINESS_NO "businessNo", A4.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", A4.CARGO_OWNER_NAME "cargoOwnerName", A4.CARGO_NAME "cargoName" FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN A1 LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST A2 ON A2. ID = A1.TRUST_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO A3 ON A3.TRUST_ID = A2. ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO A4 ON A3.CARGO_INFO_ID = A4. ID where A1.CLASS_CODE = #{classCode} AND A1.WORK_DATE = TO_DATE(#{workDateString},'YYYY-MM-DD') and A1.STATUS = 20

SELECT TO_CHAR (A . ID) "id", A .PROCESS_CD "processCode", A .PROCESS_NM "processName", A .SOURCE_CD "source", A .TARGET_CD "destination", A .IS_PRE_PROCESS "isFrontType", D.DICT_VALUE "isOutSideTruck", A.UPDATE_POINT "updatePoint", A.NEW_PROCESS "newProcess" FROM M_WORK_PROCESS A LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA D ON D .DICT_VALUE = A .IN_OUT_STORAGE_TYPE_CD AND D .DICT_TYPE = 'IN_OUT_PORT_TYPE' WHERE A .PARENT_ID = ( SELECT ID FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processCd} ) AND A.IS_TALLY_COURSE = '1'

SELECT TO_CHAR (ID) "id", TO_CHAR (EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID) "equipmentTypeId", EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME "equipmentTypeName", TO_CHAR (EQUIPMENT_ID) "equipmentId", EQUIPMENT_NO "equipmentNo", TO_CHAR (OPERATORS_ID) "operatorsId", OPERATORS_NAME "operatorsName" FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId} AND DISPATCH_TYPE = 1 AND WORK_POSITION_CODE IN (01,02,04)

SELECT TO_CHAR (ID) "id", TO_CHAR (EQUIPMENT_TYPE_ID) "equipmentTypeId", EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME "equipmentTypeName", TO_CHAR (EQUIPMENT_ID) "equipmentId", EQUIPMENT_NO "equipmentNo", TO_CHAR (OPERATORS_ID) "operatorsId", OPERATORS_NAME "operatorsName" FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId} AND DISPATCH_TYPE = 1 AND WORK_POSITION_CODE = 03

SELECT LISTAGG ( '''' || TO_CHAR(BUSINESS_NO) || '''', ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY BUSINESS_NO) "businessNo" FROM T_BUS_TRUST T1 LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO T2 ON T1. ID = T2.TRUST_ID WHERE T1.ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND T1.TYPE IN
#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT BUSINESS_NO "businessNo", A3.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", A3.CARGO_OWNER_NAME "cargoOwnerName", A3.CARGO_NAME "cargoName" FROM T_BUS_TRUST T1 LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO T2 ON T1. ID = T2.TRUST_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO A3 ON T2.CARGO_INFO_ID = A3. ID WHERE T2.CARGO_INFO_ID IN ( SELECT A1.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO A1 WHERE A1.TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AND T1.TYPE IN
#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select platenumber "text",id "value" from t_weight_info where planCode IN ${planCode} and weight_status ='2' order by weight_1st_time
select weight_status from t_weight_info where id = #{id}
select IS_FINISHED from WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND where NOTE_ID = #{id}

SELECT TO_CHAR (A . ID) "id", A .CARGO_NAME "cargoNameValue", A .CARGO_INFO_NO || '/' || T1.BUSINESS_NO || '/' || A.CARGO_NAME || '/' || A.CARGO_OWNER_NAME "cargoName", A .CARGO_CODE "cargoCode", A .CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", A. CARGO_NAME "cargoNameZ", A.CARGO_OWNER_NAME "cargoOwnerName", A.IS_HQ "isHq" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO A, T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO T1 WHERE T1.CARGO_INFO_ID = A . ID AND T1.TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT TO_CHAR (A3. ID) "id", A3.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", A3.CARGO_NAME "cargoName", A3.CARGO_CODE "cargoCode" FROM T_YARD_TALLY A1 LEFT JOIN T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM A2 ON A2.TALLY_ID = A1. ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO A3 ON A3. ID = A2.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO A4 ON A4.CARGO_INFO_ID = A3. ID WHERE PLAN_ID = #{planId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY TO_CHAR (A3. ID), A3.CARGO_INFO_NO, A3.CARGO_NAME, A3.CARGO_CODE

SELECT TO_CHAR (STOREHOUSE_ID) "id", TO_CHAR (STOREHOUSE_ID) "storehouseId", STOREHOUSE_NAME "storehouseName", TO_CHAR (REGION_ID) "locationId", REGION_NAME "locationNo", MASS_NAME "massName", TO_CHAR (MASS_ID) "massId", DIRECTION "direcTion", STOREHOUSE_NAME || '/' || REGION_NAME || '/' || MASS_NAME "label" FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN_LOCATION WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY STOREHOUSE_ID, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_ID, REGION_NAME, MASS_NAME, MASS_ID, DIRECTION
SELECT TO_CHAR (ID) "id", STORAGE_YARD_NM "stackPositionName" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD WHERE STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = 3 AND PARENT_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY ID,STORAGE_YARD_NM
SELECT count(ID) FROM T_YARD_TALLY WHERE ID = #{relationId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 AND RELATION_ID IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_YARD_TALLY (ID, PLAN_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, RELATION_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, EQUIPMENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_NO, TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_ID, TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO, OPERATORS_ID, OPERATORS_NAME, TRANSPORT_OPERATORS_ID, TRANSPORT_OPERATORS_NAME, WEIGHBRIDGE_ID, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, DEPT_PARENT_ID, DEPT_PARENT_NAME, PLAN_NO, TSPT_ID, WORK_ERWEI_ID, REMARK, RESERVATION_POUND_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME,IS_ZD) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{relationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ton,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{equipmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{equipmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transportEquipmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{transportEquipmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operatorsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transportOperatorsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{transportOperatorsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weighbridgeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptParentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptParentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tsptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workErWeiId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservationPoundId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{isZd,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

INSERT INTO T_YARD_TALLY (ID, PLAN_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, RELATION_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, EQUIPMENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_NO, TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_ID, TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO, OPERATORS_ID, OPERATORS_NAME, TRANSPORT_OPERATORS_ID, TRANSPORT_OPERATORS_NAME, WEIGHBRIDGE_ID, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, PLAN_NO, TSPT_ID, WORK_ERWEI_ID, TALLY_STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{relationId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ton,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{equipmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{equipmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transportEquipmentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{transportEquipmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operatorsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operatorsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transportOperatorsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{transportOperatorsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weighbridgeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tsptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workErWeiId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tallyStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO M_STORAGE_YARD (ID, PARENT_ID, STORAGE_YARD_NM, SHORT_CD, STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, BHT_ID) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storageYardNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shoreCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storageYardLevel,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, STORAGE_YARD.nextval)
mapper.select: SELECT A1.ID, A1.PLAN_ID, A1.RELATION_ID, A1.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, A1.OPERATORS_ID, A1.OPERATORS_NAME, A1.TRANSPORT_OPERATORS_ID, A1.TRANSPORT_OPERATORS_NAME, A1.PROCESS_CODE, A1.PROCESS_NAME, A1.EQUIPMENT_ID, A1.EQUIPMENT_NO, A1.TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_ID, A1.TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO, A1.DEPT_ID, A1.DEPT_NAME, A1.QUANTITY, A1.TON, A1.CREATE_BY, A1.CREATE_BY_NAME, A1.CREATE_TIME FROM T_YARD_TALLY A1 LEFT JOIN T_PRD_WORK_PLAN A2 ON A1.PLAN_ID = A2.ID WHERE A2.TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND A1.RELATION_ID IS NULL AND A1.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND A1.REMARK IS NULL

SELECT tyti.ID, tyti.TALLY_ID, tyti.QUANTITY, tyti.QUANTITY QUANTITY_OUT, tyti.TON, tyti.TON TON_OUT, tyti.CARGO_INFO_ID, tyti.CARGO_CODE, tyti.CARGO_NAME, tyti.STOREHOUSE_ID, tyti.STOREHOUSE_NAME, tyti.LOCATION_ID, tyti.LOCATION_NO, tyti.STACK_POSITION_ID, tyti.STACK_POSITION_NAME, tyti.CABIN_NO, tyti.CREATE_BY, tyti.CREATE_BY_NAME, tyti.CREATE_TIME, tyti.SOURCE_OR_TARGET_FLAG, mwp.SOURCE_CD SOURCE_CD, mwp.SOURCE_NM SOURCE_NM, mwp.TARGET_CD TARGET_CD, mwp.TARGET_NM TARGET_NM FROM T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM tyti LEFT JOIN T_YARD_TALLY tyt ON tyti.TALLY_ID = tyt.ID LEFT JOIN M_WORK_PROCESS mwp ON MWP.PROCESS_CD = tyt.PROCESS_CODE WHERE TALLY_ID =#{id}
SELECT UPDATE_POINT FROM M_CARGO WHERE CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND UPDATE_POINT IS NOT NULL
SELECT listagg(CARGO_INFO_ID,',') within group (order by CARGO_INFO_ID) str from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT TALLY FROM M_CARGO WHERE CARGO_CODE = #{code}
SELECT IN_OUT_STORAGE_TYPE_CD from M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT tpps.ID "inOutId", tpps.CARGO_INFO_ID, tpps.STOREHOUSE_ID "storehouseId", tpps.STOREHOUSE_NAME "storehouseName", tpps.REGION_ID "locationId", tpps.REGION_NAME "locationNo", tpps.MASS_ID "stackPositionId", tpps.MASS_NAME "stackPositionName", tbci.CARGO_CODE "cargoCode", tbci.CARGO_NAME "cargoName", tbci.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", tpps.ton "tonSurplus", tpps.QUANTITY "quantitySurplus" FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE tpps LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO tbci ON TPPS.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID
AND TPPS.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId}
SELECT ID FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL WHERE CARGO_TALLY_ID = #{tallyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT ID FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL WHERE CARGO_TALLY_DETAIL_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT ID "id" FROM T_YARD_TALLY WHERE RELATION_ID = #{tallyId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT * FROM T_YARD_TALLY WHERE id = #{tallyId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT IS_DIRECT_ACCESS "isDirectAccess", SOURCE_CD "sourceCd", TARGET_CD "targetCd" FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT ID, PLAN_ID, RELATION_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, EQUIPMENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_NO, TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_ID, TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO, QUANTITY, TON, WEIGHBRIDGE_ID, PLAN_NO, TSPT_ID, WORK_ERWEI_ID FROM T_YARD_TALLY WHERE ID = #{tallyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT tyt.ID, tyt.PLAN_ID, tyt.RELATION_ID, tyt.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, tyt.PROCESS_CODE, tyt.PROCESS_NAME, tyt.EQUIPMENT_ID, tyt.EQUIPMENT_NO, tyt.TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_ID, tyt.TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO, tyt.QUANTITY, tyt.TON, tyt.WEIGHBRIDGE_ID, tyt.PLAN_NO, tyt.TSPT_ID, tyt.WORK_ERWEI_ID, mwp.SOURCE_CD SOURCE_CD, mwp.SOURCE_NM SOURCE_NM, mwp.TARGET_CD TARGET_CD, mwp.TARGET_NM TARGET_NM, tyt.DEPT_PARENT_ID, tyt.DEPT_PARENT_NAME FROM T_YARD_TALLY tyt LEFT JOIN M_WORK_PROCESS mwp ON TYT.PROCESS_CODE = MWP.PROCESS_CD WHERE tyt.ID = #{tallyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, PLAN_ID, RELATION_ID, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, EQUIPMENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_NO, TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_ID, TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO, QUANTITY, TON FROM ( SELECT * FROM T_YARD_TALLY WHERE PLAN_ID = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT '(' || listagg (BUSINESS_NO, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY BUSINESS_NO) || ')' planCode FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT NOTE_ID "value", TRUCK_PLATE "textLabel", TRUCK_PLATE || '/' || ROUND((SYSDATE - WEIGH_IN_DT) * 24 * 60) || '分钟' "text" FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE PLAN_NO IN ${planCode} AND IS_FINISHED = 0 AND IS_DELETE = 0 AND IS_TALLY = 0 ORDER BY WEIGH_IN_DT
SELECT DS.DEPT_ID "deptId", DS.DEPT_NAME "deptName" FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH_SECONDARY DS WHERE DS.DISPATCH_TYPE = '2' AND DS.WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId}
SELECT HATCH_NUM "hatchNum" FROM M_SHIP WHERE ID IN ( SELECT SHIP_ID FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

SELECT T2.CARGO_INFO_ID CARGO_INFO_ID, NVL(SUM (CASE WHEN T5.TALLY_DATA_STAT = '20' THEN T2.QUANTITY ELSE 0 END),0) AS ZQ_QUANTITY, NVL(SUM (CASE WHEN T5.TALLY_DATA_STAT = '20' THEN T2.TON ELSE 0 END),0) AS ZQ_TON, NVL(SUM (CASE WHEN T5.TALLY_DATA_STAT = '30' THEN T2.QUANTITY ELSE 0 END),0) AS ZY_QUANTITY, NVL(SUM (CASE WHEN T5.TALLY_DATA_STAT = '30' THEN T2.TON ELSE 0 END),0) AS ZY_TON FROM T_YARD_TALLY T1, T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM T2, M_WORK_PROCESS T5 WHERE T1. ID = T2.TALLY_ID AND T1.PROCESS_CODE = T5.PROCESS_CD AND T1.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND T5.TALLY_DATA_STAT IS NOT NULL
AND T2.CARGO_INFO_ID IN
#{item}
GROUP BY T2.CARGO_INFO_ID
SELECT TARGET_CD "destination", SOURCE_CD "source" FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE ID IN ( SELECT PARENT_ID FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

SELECT CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM, '/'), M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM), '/'), M1.STORAGE_YARD_NM) as "label", M1.ID as "value", M3.ID as "storehouseId", M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM as "storehouseName", M2.ID as "regionId", M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM as "regionName", M1.ID as "massId", M1.STORAGE_YARD_NM as "massName" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD M1, M_STORAGE_YARD M2, M_STORAGE_YARD M3 WHERE M1.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '3' AND M1.PARENT_ID = M2.ID AND M2.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '2' AND M2.PARENT_ID = M3.ID AND M3.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '1' AND M1.ID = #{id}

SELECT mwp1.PROCESS_CD "processCd", mwp1.PROCESS_NM "processNm", mwp1.SOURCE_CD "sourceCd", mwp1.SOURCE_NM "sourceNm", mwp1.TARGET_CD "targetCd", mwp1.TARGET_NM "targetNm", mwp2.PROCESS_CD "processParentCd", mwp2.PROCESS_NM "processParentNm" FROM M_WORK_PROCESS mwp1 LEFT JOIN M_WORK_PROCESS mwp2 ON mwp1.parent_id = MWP2.id WHERE mwp1.NEW_PROCESS = 1 and mwp1.PROCESS_CD = #{processCd}
SELECT count(ID) FROM SYS_USER WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ( DEPT_ID IN ( 1677243491865989120, 1677243625832058880 ) AND POST_CODE = 'ZBZR' OR POST_CODE IN ('ZKY', 'BZ', 'TJY') )
SELECT count(ID) FROM SYS_USER WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND IS_SUPERADMIN = '1'
SELECT IS_PRE_PROCESS FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT to_char(ID) "id" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD WHERE PARENT_ID = #{locationId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND STORAGE_YARD_NM = #{stackPositionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT TO_CHAR(WORK_TYPE) "workType" FROM M_CARGO WHERE CARGO_CODE IN ( SELECT CARGO_CODE FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE ID IN ( SELECT CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} ) )
mapper.update:
UPDATE WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND
INV_REM = NVL(INV_REM, '') || #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_DIRECTION = #{isDirection,jdbcType=BIGINT},
IS_TALLY = 1
WHERE NOTE_ID = #{weighbridgeId}
mapper.select: SELECT b.PLAN_QUANTITY "planQuantity", b.PLAN_TON "planTon" FROM T_BUS_TRUST b WHERE b."ID" = #{trustId}

SELECT TBTC.TRUST_ID "trustId", TDSI.ID "id", TDS.SHIP_NAME || '_' || TDSI.VOYAGE "shipNameVoyage", TDS.SCN "scn" FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI ON TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID = TBCI.ID JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE TDS on TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = TDS.ID JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI on TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID WHERE TBTC.TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TBTC.TRUST_ID, TDSI.ID, TDS.SHIP_NAME, TDSI.VOYAGE, TDS.SCN
SELECT TALLY_ID,COIL_ID ID FROM T_BUS_TALLY_COILNUM WHERE TALLY_ID = #{tallyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT ID FROM T_YARD_TALLY WHERE WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{noteId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT ID "id", CARGO_CODE "cargoCode", CARGO_NAME "cargoName" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO WHERE ID = ( SELECT CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE BUSINESS_NO = #{planNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

SELECT NOTE_ID, WORK_ERWEI_ID, TSPT_ID, UNION_NO, WEIGH_IN_DT, CHECKER_IN_NAME, WEIGH_OUT_DT, CHECKER_OUT_NAME, INV_NO, PLAN_NO, GOODS_NAME, TRUCK_PLATE, COM_NAME, OUT_BANG_NO, IN_BANG_NO, WEIGHT_ALL FROM ( SELECT * FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE TRUCK_PLATE = #{truckPlate} AND IS_FINISHED = 0 AND IS_DELETE = 0 AND IS_TALLY != 9
ORDER BY WEIGH_IN_DT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM (SELECT c."ID" "cargoInfoId", c.CARGO_CODE "cargoCode", c.CARGO_NAME "cargoName" FROM T_BUS_VEHICLE_RESERVATION A, T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO b, T_BUS_CARGO_INFO c WHERE A .TRUST_CARGO_ID = b."ID" AND b.CARGO_INFO_ID = c."ID" AND A .VEHICLE_NO = #{vehicleNo} AND A .TRUST_ID = #{trustId} AND A.STATUS = '0' ORDER BY A . ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT c."ID" "cargoInfoId", c.CARGO_CODE "cargoCode", c.CARGO_NAME "cargoName", c.CARGO_INFO_NO, A .PLAN_NO FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND A, T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO b, T_BUS_CARGO_INFO c WHERE A .PLAN_NO = b.BUSINESS_NO AND b.CARGO_INFO_ID = c."ID" AND A .TRUCK_PLATE = #{vehicleNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A .IS_TALLY = 0
SELECT WORK_ERWEI_ID "workErWeiId", TSPT_ID "tsptId", PLAN_NO "planNo", WEIGH_OUT_DT "weighOutDt", IS_FINISHED "isFinished" FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE NOTE_ID = #{weighbridgeId}

select TOP 1 id noteId, weightCode unionNo, planCode planNo, platenumber truckPlate, weight_1st weightAll, weight_1st_time weighInDt from t_weight_info where platenumber= #{carNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and weight_status != 0 and weight_status != 7 and weight_status != 9 and invalid != 1 order by weight_1st_time desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_DB_TALLY ( ID, SHIP_VOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TRUST_CARGO_INFO_ID, WORK_TYPE, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, EQUIPMENT_ID, EQUIPMENT_NO, TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO, QUANTITY, TON, CARGO_INFO_ID, WEIGHBRIDGE_ID, DEPT_PARENT_ID, DEPT_PARENT_NAME, OPERATORS_NAME, RESERVATION_POUND_ID, SC_TALLY_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{shipVoyageItemId}, #{trustCargoInfoId}, #{workType}, #{workDate}, #{classCode}, #{className}, #{equipmentId}, #{equipmentNo}, #{transportEquipmentNo}, #{quantity}, #{ton}, #{cargoInfoId}, #{weighbridgeId}, #{deptParentId}, #{deptParentName}, #{operatorsName}, #{reservationPoundId}, #{scTallyId}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE TALLY_DATA_STAT IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_YARD_TALLY WHERE TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO = #{transportEquipmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{weighbridgeId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT * FROM T_YARD_TALLY WHERE TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO = #{transportEquipmentNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{weighbridgeId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT * FROM T_YARD_TALLY WHERE RESERVATION_POUND_ID = #{reservationPoundId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_YARD_TALLY WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 AND WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{weighbridgeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT WEIGHBRIDGE_ID FROM T_YARD_TALLY WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT IS_FRONTIER FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT STOREHOUSE_ID storehouseTargetId, STOREHOUSE_NAME storehouseTargetName, REGION_ID locationTargetId , REGION_NAME locationTargetNo , MASS_ID stackPositionTargetId, MASS_NAME stackPositionTargetName FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE WHERE ID IN ( SELECT IN_OUT_ID FROM T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM WHERE ID = #{id} )

SELECT A1. ID tallyId, A1.CREATE_BY_NAME, A1.CREATE_TIME, A1.WEIGHBRIDGE_ID noteId, A1.TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO truckPlate, A3.GOODS_NAME, A3.PLAN_NO, A3.WEIGH_IN_DT, A3.WEIGH_OUT_DT FROM T_YARD_TALLY a1 LEFT JOIN T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM A2 ON A1. ID = A2.TALLY_ID LEFT JOIN WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND A3 ON A3.NOTE_ID = A1.WEIGHBRIDGE_ID WHERE A1.TALLY_STATUS = 9 AND A1.DEL_FLAG = 0 AND TO_CHAR ( A1.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) >= #{startDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TO_CHAR ( A1.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD' ) <= #{endDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A1.CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT A2.ID "id", A1.SHIP_NAME "shipName", A2.VOYAGE "voyage", A2.LOAD_UNLOAD "loadUnLoad", A1.BERTH_TIME "berthTime", A1.SHIP_STATUS_CODE "shipStatusCode", A1.SHIP_STATUS_NAME "shipStatusName" FROM T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE A1 LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM A2 ON A1. ID = A2.SHIPVOYAGE_ID WHERE A1.SHIP_STATUS_CODE IN ( 10, 20, 30, 50, 60, 70, 80, 90, 100 ) ORDER BY A2.CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT ID, NUM, CARGO_INFO_ID, COIL_NUM, TON, COIL_SIZE1, COIL_SIZE2, STATUS, RECEIVE_ADDRESS FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO_COILNUM WHERE ID IN ( SELECT COIL_ID FROM T_BUS_TALLY_COILNUM WHERE TALLY_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
SELECT CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE BUSINESS_NO = ( SELECT PLAN_NO FROM WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND WHERE NOTE_ID = #{weighbridgeId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )

SELECT DISTINCT tbt.ID "trustId", tbt.TRUST_NO "trustNo", tbci.CARGO_INFO_NO "cargoInfoNo", tyt.PROCESS_CODE "processCode", tyt.PROCESS_NAME "processName", CASE WHEN max(tbt.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID) IS NOT NULL THEN MAX(tds.SHIP_NAME) || '_' || MAX(tdsi.VOYAGE) END "shipVoyage", SUM(NVL(tyti.QUANTITY, 0)) "quantity", CASE WHEN SUM(NVL(tyti.TON, 0)) != 0 THEN SUM(NVL(tyti.TON, 0)) ELSE SUM(NVL(wrp.WEIGHT_GOODS, 0)) END "ton" FROM T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM tyti LEFT JOIN T_YARD_TALLY tyt ON tyt.id = tyti.TALLY_ID LEFT JOIN T_PRD_WORK_PLAN tpwp ON TPWP.ID = tyt.PLAN_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST tbt ON TBT.ID = tpwp.TRUST_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO tbci ON TBCI.ID = tyti.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND wrp ON wrp.NOTE_ID = tyt.WEIGHBRIDGE_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM tdsi ON tbt.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = tdsi.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE tds ON tdsi.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = tds.ID WHERE TRUST_NO IS NOT NULL AND tbci.CARGO_INFO_NO = #{cargoInfoNo} GROUP BY tbt.ID, tyt.PROCESS_CODE , tyt.PROCESS_NAME , tbt.TRUST_NO, tbci.CARGO_INFO_NO, tyti.SOURCE_OR_TARGET_FLAG ORDER BY tbt.TRUST_NO DESC

SELECT MAX(TBCI.SHIP_NAME) || '_' || MAX(tdsi.VOYAGE) "shipVoyage", sum(tyti.QUANTITY) "quantity", sum(tyti.TON) "ton", tyti.CABIN_NO "cabinNo" FROM T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM tyti LEFT JOIN T_YARD_TALLY tyt ON TYT.ID = TYTI.TALLY_ID LEFT JOIN T_BUS_CARGO_INFO tbci ON TBCI.ID = TYTI.CARGO_INFO_ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM tdsi ON TDSI.ID = TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN T_PRD_WORK_PLAN tpwp ON tyt.PLAN_ID = TPWP.ID WHERE TYTI.CABIN_NO IS NOT NULL AND tpwp.TRUST_ID = #{trustId} GROUP BY TYTI.CABIN_NO ORDER BY TYTI.CABIN_NO
SELECT MAX(PROCESS_NAME) "processName", sum(QUANTITY) "quantity", sum(TON) "ton" FROM T_YARD_TALLY tyt WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 and PLAN_ID = #{planId}
select mwp.IS_DIRECT_ACCESS from T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP join M_WORK_PROCESS MWP on TPWP.PROCESS_CODE = MWP.PROCESS_CD where tpwp.id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT TARGET_CD "destination", SOURCE_CD "source" FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PROCESS_CD = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select * from T_DB_TALLY where id = #{id}
select * from T_DB_TALLY where WEIGHBRIDGE_ID = #{id}
select * from T_DB_TALLY where RESERVATION_POUND_ID = #{reservationPoundId}

select * from T_DB_TALLY_ITEM where TALLY_ID IN
#{id}
SELECT IS_LOGOUT "isLogout" FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO tbci WHERE id = #{cargoInfoId}

SELECT tyt.ID tally_id, tbci.ID CARGO_INFO_ID, tbci.CARGO_INFO_NO, TYT.QUANTITY tally_quantity, TYT.ton tally_ton, tppsd.INOUT_TYPE, TPPSD.CREATE_TIME "inPortTime", tppsd.CREATE_BY_NAME "inPortName", tyt.CREATE_BY_NAME TALLY_NAME, tyt.CREATE_TIME TALLY_TIME, tds.SHIP_NAME || CASE WHEN tds.SHIP_NAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE '_' END || tdsi.VOYAGE SHIP_VOYAGE FROM T_YARD_TALLY tyt, T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM tyti, T_PRD_WORK_PLAN tpwp, T_BUS_CARGO_INFO tbci, T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL tppsd, T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE tds, T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM tdsi WHERE tyt.PLAN_ID = TPWP.ID(+) AND tyt.ID = tyti.TALLY_ID(+) AND tyti.CARGO_INFO_ID = tbci.ID(+) AND tyt.ID = tppsd.CARGO_TALLY_ID(+) AND tbci.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = tdsi.id(+) AND tdsi.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = tds.id(+)
AND tyt.ID = #{tallyId}
SELECT STORAGE_YARD_NM "text", ID "value" FROM M_HQ_STORAGE_YARD mhsy
SELECT CARGO_NAME "name", ID "id" FROM M_HQ_CARGO mhc
